ddls:
CREATE TABLE "server_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server configuration */,
  "daily_active_users" TEXT /* Range of daily active users the configuration supports */,
  "postgres_replicas" INTEGER /* Number of PostgreSQL replicas included in the configuration */,
  "cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores */,
  "ram_gb" INTEGER /* Amount of RAM in gigabytes */,
  "disk_gb" INTEGER /* Amount of disk storage in gigabytes */,
  "nic_speed_gbps" INTEGER /* Network interface card speed in gigabits per second */,
  " Creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the configuration */,
  "Last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last updated date of the configuration */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the client's subscription */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the client's subscription */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Client address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_servers" (
  "client_server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-server mapping */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server configuration */,
  "server_status" TEXT /* Current status of the server (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  " Deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of server deployment */,
  " Decommission_date" TEXT /* Date of server decommission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_servers_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES server_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_servers_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "client_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client-server mapping */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Percentage of CPU usage */,
  "ram_usage" REAL /* Percentage of RAM usage */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Percentage of disk usage */,
  "nic_speed_usage" REAL /* Percentage of NIC speed usage */,
  "load_average" REAL /* Average system load */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_metrics_client_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_server_id") REFERENCES client_servers ("client_server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date of the invoice */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for server usage */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "invoice_pdf" TEXT /* PDF copy of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security record */,
  "client_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client-server mapping */,
  "encryption_level" TEXT /* Level of encryption applied to the server */,
  "firewall_status" TEXT /* Status of the firewall (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "intrusion_detection_status" TEXT /* Status of the intrusion detection system (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "two_factor_auth_status" TEXT /* Status of two-factor authentication (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_client_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_server_id") REFERENCES client_servers ("client_server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "client_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client-server mapping */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., upgrade, patch) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_client_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_server_id") REFERENCES client_servers ("client_server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "opened_time" TEXT /* Time when the ticket was opened */,
  "closed_time" TEXT /* Time when the ticket was closed */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " server_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "client_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client-server mapping */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was recorded */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
